AR1.justification: Step-1 artifact routed correctly under tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/timeline.md; explicitly declined to write projects/postmortems/ or touch decisions/observations/followups because those are downstream of unmet step inputs.

AR3.justification: Only path references in the response are relative (tmp/incident-postmortem/2026-05-17-staging-deploy-rollback/timeline.md, factors.md, actions.md) and the one created resolves; forward references use the same convention.

AR4.justification: Step-1 shell is the only mutation and is safely re-creatable; the agent explicitly did not write any downstream files that would later conflict with a re-run after data arrives.
